name: talk-framework
description: A reusable presentation framework. Author decks as free-standing folders of markdown (and optional JS) scenes; the framework renders them via Three.js + Vite.
author: Shawn McCool

scripts.dev: node -e "if(!process.env.CONTENT_DIR){console.error('CONTENT_DIR is not set — use talk serve <path> instead of npm run dev');process.exit(1)}" && vite
